name: social_services_heat_dome_stresses_lumen_lib_eq
premise: A regional manager wants an exception to policy; compliance says any carve-out must be written, time-limited, and auditable. In Social Services, the situation tagged internally around social services heat dome stresses lumen lib eq has converged with local pressure in the Oakline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Telemetry and witness accounts diverge; choosing one narrative for speed will discard evidence that may matter in court next month. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. The trade is not abstract: it is liberty versus equality under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Zara Ishikawa
agents.identity: I am Zara Ishikawa, the accountable executive on this bridge in Social Services. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat equality as disposable collateral every time liberty spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Marco Nowak
agents.identity: I am Marco Nowak, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Social Services. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so liberty cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes equality in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with equality.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to equality to preserve operational liberty.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Zara Ishikawa must choose under liberty versus equality. What does Zara Ishikawa do?
